I’m writing this letter to inform you what happened in Hong Kong last night and it is very DANGEROUS for your visit here in the coming Wednesday.

In short, yesterday there were a terrible cooperation between Hong Kong Police and local gangsters happened in a place called Yuen Long in Hong Kong.

More than 40 people were injured when a group of assailants in white shirts, some masked, began attacking people at random using bamboo sticks and other weapons.

BBC NEWS:
https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/world-asia-china-49066982

No police arrived at the scene hours after receiving reports, not until the gangsters had fled the scene. They also stopped responding to emergency hotlines. When they finally arrived at the scene where only victims remained, they do NOTHING to arrest the gangsters.

I cannot believe this is happening in Hong Kong. The world should know the truth, especially when the government is trying to block the news and fool people by turning the blame to the protesters.

I would request your reconsideration to your visit to Hong Kong and take immediate action to protect the safety of your team players and staffs.

I look forward to hearing from you.

A Hong Kong citizen and Fan of MC

Dear Sir/Madam,

I’m writing this letter to inform you what happened in Hong Kong last night and it is very DANGEROUS for your visit here in the coming Wednesday.

In short, yesterday there were a terrible cooperation between Hong Kong Police and local gangsters happened in a place called Yuen Long in Hong Kong.

More than 40 people were injured when a group of assailants in white shirts, some masked, began attacking people at random using bamboo sticks and other weapons.

BBC NEWS:
https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/world-asia-china-49066982

No police arrived at the scene hours after receiving reports, not until the gangsters had fled the scene. They also stopped responding to emergency hotlines. When they finally arrived at the scene where only victims remained, they do NOTHING to arrest the gangsters.

On the other hand, the protesters in Central distinct were being shoot by Hong Kong Police although they are not acting any violence to anyone. This has been proved by the recent report published by Amnesty International.

https://www.amnestyusa.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/ASA1705762019ENGLISH.pdf

I cannot believe this is happening in Hong Kong. The world should know the truth, especially when the government is trying to block the news and fool people by turning the blame to the protesters.

I would request your reconsideration to your visit to Hong Kong and take immediate action to protect the safety of your team players and staffs.

I look forward to hearing from you.

A Hong Kong citizen and Fan of MC
